Meta.title: Razan Hijama Center — The sunnah of healing, refined.
Meta.description: Licensed prophetic cupping (hijama) in Saudi Arabia. Single-use sterile tools, certified practitioners, in-clinic and home visits. Book in under a minute.
Meta.keywords: hijama, cupping therapy Saudi Arabia, hijama Riyadh, hijama Jeddah, prophetic medicine, sunnah cupping, wet cupping

Hero.title: The sunnah of healing,
Hero.subtitle: We practice hijama with reverence for the sunnah, clinical precision, and a calm, considered hospitality. MoH-licensed practitioners, single-use sterile instruments, and total privacy for every guest.

Benefits.title: A prophetic therapy that modern medicine respects
Benefits.subtitle: Wet cupping has been shown to support circulation, ease chronic pain, and improve recovery. Every benefit below is grounded in clinical reviews and our daily practice.

circulation.title: Circulation
circulation.body: Hijama stimulates local blood flow and helps relieve vascular stasis in treated areas.

detox.title: Cellular renewal
detox.body: Wet cupping aids the removal of stagnant interstitial fluid and supports tissue renewal.

pain.title: Chronic pain relief
pain.body: Strongest evidence is for lower-back, neck, shoulder pain, and migraine.

immune.title: Immune support
immune.body: Mild local trauma triggers a controlled inflammatory response that supports immune activity.

stress.title: Stress & sleep
stress.body: Patients consistently report deeper sleep and lower stress in the days that follow.

energy.title: Renewed energy
energy.body: A lighter, more energetic feeling is reported by most patients within a week.

Sunnah.title: “Indeed, the best of remedies you have is hijama.”
Sunnah.body: Hijama is among the most emphasized therapies in the prophetic tradition. At Razan we keep this practice alive with modern clinical standards, and align our calendar with the recommended sunnah days.
Sunnah.daysBody: The 17th, 19th, and 21st of every Hijri month — as narrated from the Prophet ﷺ.

Services.title: Hijama packages
Services.subtitle: Three packages built around real patient needs. Every session includes a consultation, full sterilization, and a post-session report.

classic.name: Classic Hijama
classic.description: Wet cupping at the primary sunnah points (kahil & akhda'ayn). Ideal for prevention, headaches, and neck tension.

therapeutic.name: Therapeutic Hijama
therapeutic.description: A tailored protocol for back, shoulder, and sciatic pain — paired with adjunct massage and a personal point-map.

home.name: Home Visit
home.description: We come to you in Riyadh. The same protocol as the clinic, with the highest sterilization standards and total privacy.

Gallery.title: Real results from our patients
Gallery.subtitle: Drag the slider on any card to compare. Published with consent; individual outcomes may vary.

Testimonials.title: Trust, built one session at a time
Testimonials.subtitle: Over 7,200 sessions and thousands of stories. Here are a few.

0.name: Ahmed Al-Otaibi
0.body: Honestly, my back pain dropped noticeably after just two sessions. Sterilization is professional and the practitioner is experienced. Highly recommended.

1.name: Noura Al-Qahtani
1.body: First time trying hijama — they received me in a private women's room with a certified practitioner. A calm, dignified experience.

2.name: Khalid Al-Shahri
2.body: The home visit was right on time. Kit was spotless and the result was excellent — I felt the difference by the next day.

3.name: Sarah Al-Dossari
3.body: I love that scheduling is flexible and that they follow up after the session. I now visit them on the sunnah days every month.

0.a: It feels like a light pinch during the small superficial scratches. Most patients describe it as far easier than expected, and it's over quickly.

1.a: Between 30 and 60 minutes including consultation, depending on the package.

2.a: Yes. The clinic and our practitioners are licensed by the Saudi Ministry of Health under the complementary medicine framework.

3.a: The 17th, 19th, and 21st of each Hijri month. We open extra slots on those days.

4.a: For pregnant women, those with bleeding disorders, or on blood thinners. We'll assess in your consultation.

5.a: Yes, within Riyadh. You can book it directly from the services section.

Map.title: In the heart of Riyadh
Map.subtitle: A quiet location with private parking and separate male and female rooms.

Contact.subtitle: Leave us a message and we'll reply within one business hour.

CTA.title: Begin your journey with Razan
CTA.subtitle: Book in under a minute. We'll help you choose the right package for your case.

Footer.newsletterBody: One short, useful note from our practitioners every two weeks. Never spam.

Whatsapp.label: Chat on WhatsApp
Whatsapp.prefilled: As-salamu alaykum, I'd like to book a hijama appointment.

Booking.metaDescription: Reserve your session at Razan — pick a package and a time in under a minute.
Booking.title: Book your appointment in a few steps
Booking.subtitle: Choose a package, pick a time, share your details — a WhatsApp confirmation lands instantly.

step1.title: Choose your package
step1.subtitle: Three packages tailored to different needs — every session includes a consultation and full sterilization.

step2.title: When works for you?
step2.subtitle: Pick a day and time. Dates marked in gold are the recommended sunnah days (17, 19, 21 Hijri).
step2.noSlots: No slots available on this day — try another.

step3.title: Your details
step3.subtitle: We need your name and mobile to send the booking confirmation.
step3.name: Full name

step4.title: Review your booking
step4.subtitle: Double-check the details. We'll WhatsApp you to confirm in minutes.
step4.name: Name
step4.terms: By confirming you accept our cancellation policy and agree that the clinic may contact you on WhatsApp to finalize the appointment.

confirmed.title: Your booking is in
confirmed.subtitle: Thank you {name} — we'll WhatsApp you shortly to confirm the appointment.
confirmed.name: Name
confirmed.approvalNote: Your appointment is pending our review. You'll receive a final WhatsApp confirmation shortly.
confirmed.whatsappPrefilled: As-salamu alaykum, I just booked a hijama appointment and want to confirm it.

Chat.title: Ask Razan
Chat.subtitle: We usually reply instantly
Chat.greetingBody: Ask about hijama, our services, sunnah days, or how to book. We won't give medical advice — just clear, practical answers.
Chat.starter1: What's the difference between your services?
Chat.starter2: When are the sunnah days this month?
Chat.starter3: How do I book an appointment?
Chat.disclaimer: Replies are AI-generated. For medical advice, please consult a doctor.
Chat.errorRateLimit: Too many messages — please wait a moment and try again.
Chat.errorOffline: AI chat is offline. Please WhatsApp us instead.
Chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
